description_long: This is an electric guitar with a single-cutaway solid body finished in a glossy teal color, complemented by a natural wood edge along the bottom. The body features two chrome-covered humbucker pickups, a three-way toggle switch, and four control knobs, likely for volume and tone adjustments. The neck is dark, possibly rosewood or ebony, with inlaid fret markers and a set-in construction. The headstock is angled, with three tuning pegs on each side and a visible truss rod cover, suggesting a classic Les Paul-style design. The bridge is a tune-o-matic type with a stopbar tailpiece, both in chrome. The overall build and hardware indicate a high-quality instrument suitable for professional use in urban music settings.
description: A glossy teal, single-cutaway electric guitar with chrome hardware, dual humbuckers, and a classic Les Paul-style headstock. Features include four control knobs, a three-way switch, and a natural wood edge.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the guitar's slim, contoured body and the full length of the neck.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pickups, control knobs, bridge, and the headstock with tuning pegs.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile displaying the body thickness, hardware placement, and neck alignment.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the body shape, control layout, and the transition from body to neck.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled, three-per-side tuning pegs, truss rod cover, classic Les Paul shape
